title: 'Shut up Trump': Iran mocks US president with AI-video over ceasefire extension on 'Pakistan's request'
summary_full: Iran's consulate in Hyderabad shared an AI-generated video mocking US President Donald Trump's announcement of a ceasefire extension with Iran. The clip humorously depicts a fictional Trump agreeing to the extension at Pakistan's request, following Iran's accusations of US "disregard and lack of good faith" amid the ongoing peace negotiations.
